underlying_goal: Refine a custom ESLint rule to exclude callback/predicate functions, framework methods, and allow explicit skipping of specific function names from the require-object-params check
friction_detail: Claude twice tried to fit user's request into existing structures (lifecycleHooks, decorators) instead of creating the explicit skip array the user wanted, requiring user to re-explain.
brief_summary: User wanted to iteratively refine a custom ESLint rule to handle various exclusion cases (callbacks, NewExpression, explicit function names), and after some back-and-forth about approach, all requested changes were implemented.
